parsed_review.summary: CP00-785 (Migration Platform review-receipt implementation bridge, risk C, 150 units, RP25.P08.M02.S05-RP25.P08.M09.S02) is a descriptor-only closeout pack and its readiness for closeout is supported by implementation, tests, command evidence, and boundary enforcement. Verified through Read/Grep/Glob only: (1) Identity/binding consistent across manifest.json, review-baseline.json, registry binding (registry.js:502), contract latest_pack/latest_projection (contracts/migration-platform-contract.json:41,41697), plan live_state.pack_id=CP00-785 (closeout-pack-plan.json:36) and next-pack-queue.json live_latest_pack_id=CP00-785 (line 8); next pack CP00-786 / RP25.P08.M09.S03. (2) Deliverable distribution {hermes_evidence:68,claude_review:7,implementation:68,test:7}=150 and micro-title distribution (16/22/22/22/22/22/22/2) match the baseline and the contract cp785 coverage block (contract:89955, valid:true, errors:[]); MIGRATION_PLATFORM_CP785_REQUIREMENTS (registry.js:2315) encodes the same counts. (3) createCaseSet/createDescriptor (service.js:231/271) and the CP785 factory (service.js:1966) build deep-frozen rows with descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, and no raw_payload/source_system_payload/external_credential/real_client_data, all *_runtime_opened=false, plus authority_boundary {claude_is_final_approval:false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true, runtime_opening_pack_id:CP00-786}; MIGRATION_PLATFORM_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (registry.js:533) reinforces writes_product_state=false and all source-system imports closed. (4) validators.js:2612/2640 enforce distribution, section rows, descriptor-only, no-leak guards, no source-system runtime, permission/audit non-exposure, Hermes/Claude gates, read-only Claude packet, and handoff drift. (5) model.test.js:1102-1167 asserts coverage.errors=[], descriptor validation errors=[], runtime-closed flags, hermes.emits_runtime_receipt=false, claude.read_only=true, handoff to CP00-786, contract latest_projection=cp785 descriptor, and contract validation.valid=true. (6) command-evidence.json records all 10 required validation commands plus git diff --check and node --check/build steps at exit_code 0 with no failures (status passed, no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false). (7) The CP178+ hardening library (scripts/lib/closeout-pack-claude-review-hardening.mjs) correctly rejects auth failures, 0-byte stdout, malformed JSON, fenced JSON/prose, tool-call-shaped output, missing required fields, permission denials, and missing structured_output, and gates closeout eligibility on PASS/PASS_WITH_FINDINGS with p0/p1/p2=0. (8) Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer and not final approver (promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false; claude_packet.read_only=true); Hermes appears only as deterministic control-plane descriptor/receipt metadata (emits_runtime_receipt=false; hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false), with no spawn/exec/fetch/http in packages/migration product code; no secrets/PII present. (9) No overclaim: manifest production_ready=false and runtime_ready=false, construction-inspection verdict=PENDING with descriptor_verified=false, adjudication in_progress, claude-review-result status=pending — all correctly gated on this read-only review; command-evidence.production_ready=true is the established intra-pack command-gate field (identical pattern to closed CP00-784/CP00-783). Enterprise-trust/human-final-approval authority remains outside this receipt by design and the pack makes no runtime or enterprise-trust claim, so blocks_goal_closeout is false. One non-blocking P3 provenance observation is recorded about changed-file-scope.json snapshot staleness. No P0/P1/P2 findings.

findings.title: changed-file-scope snapshot omits working-tree-dirty plan/queue governance files tied to CP00-785
findings.details: The git_status_rows snapshot (review baseline created 2026-06-15T18:57:51Z) does not list docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json or docs/closeout-pack-plan/next-pack-queue.json, both of which are modified in the working tree and are directly tied to CP00-785 (closeout-pack-plan.json live_state.pack_id=CP00-785 at line 36; next-pack-queue.json live_latest_pack_id=CP00-785 at line 8). They appear in neither active_pack_implementation_refs nor unrelated_dirty_files_preserved. This is point-in-time snapshot staleness: the scope artifact predates/omits the 'npm run closeout-pack-plan:generate' step recorded in command-evidence.json (exit_code 0) that dirties those governance/queue files. It does not affect the descriptor implementation, tests, or command evidence, and no production_ready gate depends on it. Same recurring, non-blocking observation as CP00-784 (CP784-P3-01).
findings.recommendation: Optionally regenerate changed-file-scope.json after the plan/queue generation step so the snapshot reflects all pack-adjacent dirty files, or explicitly classify the plan/queue files (e.g., under unrelated_dirty_files_preserved or as governance state). Non-blocking.
findings.post_review_disposition: Does not block CP00-785 closeout. Informational provenance note only; pack-level production_ready remains correctly gated (manifest production_ready=false, construction-inspection verdict=PENDING) on this read-only review and subsequent adjudication/human approval.
